chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 2007 of 2017 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 09-12-2021 Mr. Qurban Ali Kalwar, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Akhtar, Advocate for Respondents-Bank. Mr. Muhammad Hamzo Buriro, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- On filing of comments by Respondents No.2 to 4, it has transpired that the Petitioner is at serial No.56 of the list of candidates against deceased quota in Sindh (Rural); whereas, interviews of all candidates are yet to be conducted. It has been further stated that the exercise for preparing a list in a chronological order in respect of the deceased quota has been made pursuant to order passed by the Hon’ble Supreme Court dated 05-05-2016 in Civil Petition No.201 of 2016, through which the judgment dated 01-12-2015 passed by the Peshawar High Court in Writ Petition No.3328-P/2014 has been maintained, wherein the Respondent- Bank was directed to formulate a policy and a seniority list of such persons under the deceased quota. It has been further informed that the available vacancies in Sindh Rural (12 seats) have already been filled; hence, the Petitioner, at the present moment, cannot be considered. In view of such position, as of today, the Petition does not merit any consideration, and is therefore, dismissed; however, as and when there is a vacancy and the Petitioner is eligible otherwise, his case be considered in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
